CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.title: Paranormal
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to your stacks, then lose half of them (rounded down).
CRYPTID-PARANORMAL_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, gain Block equal to your stacks, then lose half of them (rounded down).
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.title: Madness
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.description: Deal 25% less damage and gain 25% less Block. Decrements at the end of the player's turn.
CRYPTID-MADNESS_POWER.smartDescription: Deal 25% less damage and gain 25% less Block.
